title: UnstableSMP - Law Fight
description: You've all seen those Minecraft videos like 1 vs 1000, 2 vs 1000, and etc. Would you like to try fighting against that many players yourself? If so, this ModPack is just for you.
body:
### This is the best modpack for playing as if you were on UnstableSMP.

This modpack comes with a **pre-installed map** for single-player mode. On this map, you can **fight against the “Law”** from UnstableSMP. Just to clarify, the **original author of this map is [**CarpetPvpMaps**](https://www.youtube.com/@CarpetPVPMaps)**.


**Thanks to this PvP ModPack, you can practice your PvP skills against a large number of players (bots).**
- All the necessary mods for better gameplay are already pre-installed.
- A training map styled after UnstableSMP is pre-installed.
- All the necessary mods for PvP and optimization are also pre-installed.

**By downloading this modpack, you won't have to bother with the tedious process of installing maps, selecting mods, etc.**


**You can choose who you will fight for on this map:**
![You can choose who you will fight for on this map.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3294a92823421b409abdcc3bb11d4ef5c26f76a.png)

**Choose your kit or customize your own:**
![Choose your kit or customize your own.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a6a902d4ca4c5a5b1b4e96f4f1fd41d6dee12a5.png)

**Fully customizable bots:**
![Fully customizable bots.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e41dcbfa97eb7133b4e39201889459c73dd349b.png)


**Choose your partner:**
![Choose your partner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f7cf1c895531beff1d05eb57cfa844774c26f98.png)


**You can turn on the music if you get bored:**
![You can turn on the music if you get bored.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1154ad2842a81b1ffae4bd3f641460a146dfc985.png)

 
### IMPORTANT
If you want to see an example and **better understand the map**, you can watch this video from the **original author** (all rights to the map belong to him):
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9CYqp5DdcUw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
